themes: Manager-heavy backlog with urgent wait times: Nearly all contacts are Managers with many waiting over 100 days, signaling a systemic gap in proactive product outreach to the practitioners who run locations and reports daily.

Repeat accounts signal unresolved friction: Several accounts appear multiple times (Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Avenue5 Residential, Ford, Anytime Fitness, Vetcor, 29th Street Living), suggesting persistent pain points that haven't been addressed and risk of escalating dissatisfaction.

Multi-vertical portfolio skewing toward multi-location operators: The backlog spans fitness, hospitality, real estate, food & beverage, home services, and automotive, with a strong concentration of multi-location franchise and property management brands, pointing to shared needs around location-level reporting, workflow efficiency, and scalable governance.
